text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've been enjoying racing more ever since coming
to Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are so many talented Umamusume here, so
winning isn't necessarily a given.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...At times, getting first place feels like a pipe
dream.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But when I do win, victory tastes all the sweeter.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want to savor that taste, so I'd like to win more
races—including this one, of course.

Although Oguri Cap appears as calm and quiet as
ever, her words exude a powerful sense of
determination.
